IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO CONTINUALLY NURTURE A BALANCE OF PHYSICAL, MENTAL, AND SPIRITUAL WELL-BEING FOR INDIGENT NATIVE AMERICANS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO CONTINUALLY NURTURE A BALANCE OF PHYSICAL, MENTAL, AND SPIRITUAL WELL-BEING FOR INDIGENT NATIVE AMERICANS.
IRS990.Desc: THROUGH ITS HEALTH SERVICES PROGRAMS INDIAN HEALTH COUNCIL PROVIDES MEDICAL, DENTAL, PHARMACEUTICAL AND COUNSELING SERVICES TO NORTH SAN DIEGO COUNTY INDIAN TRIBES.ON-SITE PROGRAMS INCLUDE AN ARRAY OF CULTURALLY APPROPRIATE HEALTH CARE AND RELATED SERVICES RANGING FROM PRENATAL TO GERIATRIC; WELL-CHILD TO ADULT FITNESS CLASSES, DIABETES CLINICS, AS WELL AS YOUTH SUBSTANCE ABUSE PREVENTION AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE PROGRAMS. PERIODIC SERVICES INCLUDE SPECIALIZED/PART-TIME SERVICES SUCH AS PODIATRY, ORTHODONTICS, MAMMOGRAMS, EYE CLINICS, AND OTHERS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: ALL OTHER FEDERAL, STATE AND PRIVATE PROGRAMS TO NUTURE A BALANCE OF PHYSICAL, MENTAL AND SPIRITUAL WELL-BEING FOR INDIGENT NATIVE AMERICANS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS CONSIST OF NATIVE AMERICAN TRIBAL MEMBERS WHO ARE RELATED FAMILY MEMBERS SUCH AS BROTHERS, SISTERS, AND COUSINS, ETC.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZATION CONSIST OF NINE TRIBES OF NORTHERN SAN DIEGO COUNTY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 7a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EACH TRIBE ELECTS TWO TRIBAL MEMBERS AS REPRESENTATIVES WHO SERVE ON THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OF THE ORGANIZATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 7b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DECISIONS OF THE BOARD ARE SUBJECT TO APPROVAL BY THE MEMBERS OF THE NINE TRIBAL COUNCILS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: REVIEWED BY THE AUDIT COMMITTEE BEFORE ISSUANCE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE COMPENSATION FOR THE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR AND CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER ARE REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY THE ORGANIZATIONS COMPENSATION COMMITTEE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE COMPENSATION FOR OTHER OFFICERS OR KEY EMPLOYEES IS REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY THE ORGANIZATIONS COMPENSATION COMMITTEE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE PROCESS FOR OVERSIGHT OF THE AUDIT HAS NOT CHANGED.
